title: Effectum Tool Definition
description: Schema for tool definition files in system/tools/. Each file defines tools for a specific stack or category.

name.description: Human-readable name for this tool set (e.g., 'Foundation Tools')

description.description: Brief description of when these tools are used

bin.description: Binary name to check in PATH (e.g., 'git', 'supabase')

category.description: Tool category: system (OS-level), foundation (always needed), stack (stack-specific), optional (nice-to-have)

why.description: Human-readable reason why this tool is needed

priority.description: Installation priority (0 = highest, 10 = lowest). Determines install order.

autoInstall.description: If false, tool is recommended with a link but not auto-installed (e.g., Docker, Xcode)

install.description: Platform-specific install commands. 'all' is used as fallback.

check.description: Command to verify the tool is working (e.g., 'git --version'). Falls back to 'which <bin>'.

manualUrl.description: URL for manual installation instructions (used when autoInstall is false)

check.description: Command to check auth status (exit 0 = authenticated)

url.description: URL where user can create tokens/credentials

auth.description: Authentication configuration. Omit if tool needs no auth.
